user.title: Solar Manager
user.description: Choose how Home Assistant should talk to your Solar Manager gateway.

cloud.title: Solar Manager Cloud
cloud.description: Enter your Solar Manager cloud credentials and your gateway smId.

data.sm_id: Gateway smId (16-character ID printed on the gateway)

local.title: Solar Manager Local
local.description: Enter the gateway's local address and the API key you generated in its web UI.

data.api_key: API key (the password you entered in the gateway UI)
data.sm_id: Gateway smId (optional, used as entity ID prefix to preserve history when switching from cloud)
data.verify_ssl: Verify TLS certificate (off by default — the gateway uses a self-signed cert)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Solar Manager API. Check the address and your network.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the credentials or API key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See logs for details.

local.title: Solar Manager Local
local.description: Update gateway address and API key.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Solar Manager API. Check the address and your network.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the credentials or API key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See logs for details.
